name: learning-rate-lora
paperTitle: Learning Rate Matters: Vanilla LoRA May Suffice for LLM Fine-tuning
content:
## Introduction

LoRA effectiveness depends critically on learning rate; proper tuning makes vanilla LoRA competitive with advanced methods. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

LoRA effectiveness depends critically on learning rate; proper tuning makes vanilla LoRA competitive with advanced methods.
